commands.review_summary:
The branch refines Traditional Chinese strings and routes quota warning, session quota, and login success notification copy through localized string keys with focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main still uses hardcoded English strings for the affected quota/session/login notification copy. I did not run the app, and no attached after-fix UI proof is available yet.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor proof and human zh-Hant wording review; no narrow automated repair is apparent from the source review.

target.title: Improve Traditional Chinese localization wording
target.body:
## Summary
- Refine Traditional Chinese localization wording for more natural Taiwan usage.
- Replace provider terminology from 供應商 to 提供者 across zh-Hant strings.
- Localize CodexBar notification copy for quota warnings, session depleted/restored, and login success.

## Root Cause
- Settings notification labels were localized, but posted `UNMutableNotificationContent` title/body strings still used hardcoded English.

## Visual Proof
- Redacted zh-Hant app screenshots are ready to attach to this PR conversation/body.
- The proof covers General, Providers, About, and Debug settings panes with Traditional Chinese strings loaded in the running app.

## Validation
- `make check`
- `swift test --filter 'QuotaWarningNotificationLogicTests|SessionQuotaNotificationLogicTests|LoginNotificationLogicTests|LocalizationBundleTests'`
- `plutil -lint Sources/CodexBar/Resources/*/Localizable.strings`
- placeholder parity check between en and zh-Hant strings
- `git diff --check HEAD`
target.author: jack24254029
